definition.comment: Titles with 'feat.' or 'ft.' — collaborative moments

definition.name: Numbered Sequels
definition.comment: Titles containing 'Part' or 'Pt.' — serialised storytelling

definition.name: Interlude & Skit
definition.comment: Titles containing 'interlude', 'skit', or 'intro' — the spaces between

definition.name: Self-Titled Tracks
definition.comment: Tracks where title starts with the same text as the album — the namesake

definition.name: Parenthetical Versions
definition.comment: Titles containing parentheses — alternate versions, editions, and notes

definition.name: The A-List
definition.comment: Artists starting with 'A' — top of the alphabet, top of the pile

definition.name: The Number Ones
definition.comment: Tracks with numbers in the title — countable music

definition.name: The 'The' Bands
definition.comment: Artists starting with 'The' — the most common word in band names
